title: masdevallia estradae
intro: Masdevallia estradae, also known as the Estrada's masdevallia, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of South America and is highly valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and bronchodilator properties. Herbal preparations of Masdevallia estradae typically involve the roots or leaves of the plant, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
